title: Finite Sigma-Algebra And Measure Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite measure bad complement QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed complement-measure row where exact replay computes mu(A)=1/3 and mu(U)=1, but the false complement claim requires mu(A^c)=1/2 while preserving finite complement additivity.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite-measure rows only when they add distinct exact-linear normalization, additivity, complement, or monotonicity pressure; keep countable additivity, Lebesgue measure, integration, and convergence theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite sigma-algebra membership and closure checks as deterministic Bool formulas.
